name: IRC_DIAG_BKP_ROWS
description: This table stores backup data for diagnostic framework script execution runs.

columns.Name: BKP_ROW_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the backup row. System generated value.

columns.Name: EXECUTION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the diagnostic test run.

columns.Name: RUN_NAME
columns.Comments: User name of the diagnostic test run.

columns.Name: RUN_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the diagnostic test run.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments for the backup table row.

columns.Name: SKID
columns.Comments: SKID to store the surrogate key of the transaction table row being backed up.

columns.Name: XML_DATA
columns.Comments: XML representation of the table row being backed up in the diagnostic run.

columns.Name: OBJECT_NAME
columns.Comments: Table name of the transaction table being backed up.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise of the diagnostic test run.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
